The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Phantasmal Reliquary

Whiteboards hold equations of forbidden realities.
Cabinets keep Antarctic manifests.
Surfaces show recent claw disturbances.
Beacon turned tomb for grand ambitions.
Scientist vanished pre-breach.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.
